title: Malik's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik explores different colored foods throughout his day, discovering the joy of red strawberries, yellow bananas, green peas, blue blueberries, orange carrots, and purple grapes through sensory play and tasting.

pages.text: Malik wakes up hungry! What colorful foods will he eat today?

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits in a high chair, surrounded by swirling rainbow paint splatters and drips creating a joyful morning scene with dominant yellow tones like sunshine
illustration.alt: Baby Malik in high chair with rainbow paint splashes around him

pages.text: Red strawberries! Sweet and juicy. Malik smiles and claps his hands.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holds a bright red strawberry, dominant red paint splatters and finger paint smears create a sensory explosion of crimson around him
illustration.alt: Malik holding a red strawberry with red paint splashes

pages.text: Yellow bananas! Soft and yummy. Malik takes big bites.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes eating a yellow banana, dominant sunny yellow paint drips and splashes create a bright joyful scene with finger paint textures
illustration.alt: Malik eating a yellow banana with yellow paint around him

pages.text: Green peas roll around his plate. Pop! Pop! Pop!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes playing with green peas on his plate, dominant emerald green paint splatters and drips create a playful mess with finger paint aesthetic
illustration.alt: Malik playing with green peas and green paint splashes

pages.text: Blue blueberries! Round and small. Malik picks them up one by one.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes carefully picking up blueberries, dominant deep blue paint splashes and drips surround him in a sensory explosion of color
illustration.alt: Malik picking up blueberries with blue paint everywhere

pages.text: Orange carrots! Crunchy and fun. Malik chews and giggles.

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes munching on orange carrot sticks, dominant bright orange paint splatters and finger paint smears create a vibrant joyful scene
illustration.alt: Malik eating orange carrots with orange paint splashes

pages.text: Purple grapes! Sweet and squishy. What a colorful day of eating!

illustration.description: Malik with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes surrounded by all the colorful foods, dominant purple paint drips mix with rainbow splatters creating a celebration of color exploration and joy
illustration.alt: Malik with purple grapes and rainbow of food colors around him

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are the strawberries Malik eats?
questions.explanation: Strawberries are red! Malik enjoyed the sweet red strawberries.

questions.question: What yellow food does Malik eat?
questions.explanation: Malik eats a yellow banana! Bananas are soft and yummy.

questions.question: What does Malik do with the green peas?
questions.explanation: Malik plays with the green peas as they roll around his plate!
